title: Kiru x Bunji
description: A Pink Themed PvP Texturepack made for the Youtuber Kiru for his 50k Subscribers
body: This texturepack was made for the German youtuber [Kiru](https://www.youtube.com/@KiruMinecraft) to celebrate his 50k subscribers, it is a 1.21 PvP Texturepack that features an amazing pink theme on most PvP related items and GUI alongside a lot of quality of life features like invisible explosion particles and smaller totems. ### Everything changed - Short Retextured Swords - Iron, Diamond and Netherite Armor - Diamond Set, Blocks and Ores - Various PvP-Related Items like Ender Pearls, Exp Bottles, Wind Charges, Golden Apples - Trident, End Crystals and Anchors - Enchant Glint - GUI and HUD - Animated Totem of Undying, Fireworks, Potions and Tipped Arrows - Invisible Explosion Particles, Block Breaking Particles, Eating Particles and Smaller Totems
